metadata.description: Review-only extracted evidence candidates from trusted source documents. Candidate facts remain separate from live helper, IFRA, and catalog data until manually promoted.

benzoin_siam_absolute:scentdesc:benzoin_.candidateValue: From Styrax tonkinensis resin — sweet, warm balsamic character with benzaldehyde-vanilla facets. One of the great fixatives of perfumery. Adds warmth, roundness, and oriental depth to any accord. Anchors musks and florals beautifully.
notes: Source-backed from the current live catalog row text in src/App.jsx.
Prepared as a low-risk scentDesc-only evidence candidate.
Document-backed from the downloaded M0067632_PDS.pdf file in the source-document registry.
Local PDF inspection classified this source as canonical_target_likely_matches and surfaced the product identity 'Benzoin resinoid on carrier'.
Prepared from the product CAS line in the PDS, which lists product CAS 9000-72-0 separately from the carrier Triethyl Citrate CAS 77-93-0.
promotionNotes: Promotion state synced from an already-matching helper canonical seed value via scripts/promote_evidence_candidates.mjs.

notes: Document-backed from the downloaded Peru_Balsam_Signature_Resinoid.pdf file in the source-document registry.
Local extraction shows the PDF content is actually an EPA/CCID page titled 'Balsams, peru' with CAS 8007-00-9 and Peru balsam oil-style synonyms.
Rejected as a promotion candidate because the document looks like Peru balsam oil / oleoresin evidence rather than a clean Peru balsam resinoid identity source.
Document-backed from the downloaded 82ALL_PERU_BALSAM_RESINOID_EXTRA_R7210.pdf file in the source-document registry.
Local PDF inspection classified this source as canonical_target_likely_matches and surfaced the product identity 'PERU BALSAM RESINOID EXTRA'.
Prepared from the ingredient identity cue 'MYROXYLON PEREIRAE OIL/EXTRACT' in the product-specific Fraterworks allergen document.
promotionNotes: Promotion state synced from an already-matching helper canonical seed value via scripts/promote_evidence_candidates.mjs.

peru_balsam_oil:scentdesc:peru_balsam_oi.candidateValue: Benzyl benzoate and cinnamic esters give this a warm, sweet-resinous, cinnamic amber character. Excellent fixative with a warm balsamic depth. Pairs beautifully with vanilla, musks, and woody notes in oriental bases.
